    <item>
        <guid>nba528523</guid>
        <title>LeBron James: Leads Los Angeles with 26 points</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lebron-james-2344</link>
        <description>James collected 26 points (11-17 FG, 3-5 3Pt, 1-2 FT), eight rebounds, 11 assists, two steals and one block in 32 minutes during Thursday's 119-103 win over the Warriors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 09 Apr 2026 9:34:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528520</guid>
        <title>Baylor Scheierman: Ties career highs in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/baylor-scheierman-6280</link>
        <description>Scheierman supplied 20 points (7-8 FG, 6-7 3Pt) and four rebounds across 30 minutes in Thursday's 112-106 loss to the Knicks.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 09 Apr 2026 8:09:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528519</guid>
        <title>Payton Pritchard: Provides spark in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/payton-pritchard-5131</link>
        <description>Pritchard posted 23 points (10-20 FG, 3-8 3Pt), six assists and three rebounds across 36 minutes in Thursday's 112-106 loss to the Knicks.

    </item>
    <item>

        <title>Josh Hart: Game-high 26 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/josh-hart-4136</link>
        <description>Hart finished Thursday's 112-106 win over the Celtics with 26 points (10-15 FG, 5-7 3Pt, 1-2 FT), three assists, one rebound and one steal across 35 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 09 Apr 2026 7:51:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528517</guid>
        <title>Karl-Anthony Towns: Double-doubles in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/karl-anthony-towns-3741</link>
        <description>Towns tallied 16 points (6-12 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 3-3 FT), 12 rebounds, four assists and two steals across 30 minutes in Thursday's 112-106 win over the Celtics.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
